source_pr.title: executor, util: employ memory Tracker to track memory usage during query execution
source_pr.body: This patch implemented a memory `Tracker` to track the memory usage during query execution. It contains an optional limit and can be arranged into a tree structure such that the consumption tracked by a Tracker is also tracked by its ancestors.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor, util: employ memory Tracker to track memory usage during query execution.
fix_pattern: executor, util: employ memory Tracker to track memory usage during query execution

evidence: files: config/config.go, config/config.toml.example, executor/executor.go, executor/join.go, executor/prepared.go, executor/sort.go, mysql/errname.go, server/conn.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, sessionctx/variable/varsutil.go, tidb-server/main.go, util/chunk/list.go, util/chunk/list_test.go, util/memory/action.go, util/memory/mem_tracker.go, util/memory/memory_tracker.go, util/memory/tracker.go, util/memory/tracker_test.go
